product_fixes: #2 (HIGH): ENUM English leaks removed — write-off modal now «Списано», expense modal «Ремонт»; no UnitStatus/RepairStatus strings visible to users.
#3 (HIGH): Russian pluralization helper apps/web/src/lib/pluralRu.ts added — «карточка/карточки/карточек» correctly produced for 1/2/5/11/21. Used in warehouse-scan success toast.

#4 (HIGH): silent createRepair failure surfaced — completeSession returns createdRepairIds[] + failedBrokenUnits[]; failure path logs console.error, forces unit → MAINTENANCE (with CRITICAL log on nested failure), writes REPAIR_CREATE_FAILED audit; routes/warehouse.ts pipes both fields; scan UI reads actual counts.
technical_fixes: H1: Decimal precision in addWorkLog — `{ increment: new Prisma.Decimal(timeSpentHours/partCost) }` replaces `.toDecimalPlaces(2).toNumber()`; test asserts 0.1+0.2+0.1 = 0.4 exactly.

H2: silent createRepair failure in scan integration — return type extended, error logged, audit REPAIR_CREATE_FAILED, unit forced MAINTENANCE, tests assert duplicate active repair → failedBrokenUnits.length === 1.
M1: cursor pagination — `orderBy id desc` with `where.id = { lt: cursor }` (consistent direction); non-overlapping page verified in tests.
M2: Zod enum validation on status + urgency query params — unknown values return 400 (verified by GET /api/repairs?status=FOO and ?urgency=VERY_URGENT).
M3: assignRepair closed-guard — REPAIR_ALREADY_CLOSED throws at top of tx; tests verify.
M4: atomic takeRepair — POST /api/repairs/:id/take merges assign + IN_REPAIR + REPAIR_TAKE audit in single transaction; rolesGuard TECH+SA; UI calls single endpoint.
deferred_out_of_scope: #5 SLA overdue threshold configurable — hard-coded 5d accepted for Sprint 4
